chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-14 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 2365/19 2. For orders on M.A 2366/19 3. For hearing. 19.03.2019 Mr. Bilawal Bajeer, Advocate for applicants alongwith applicants. 1&2. Granted. 3. Learned counsel for applicants submits that the applicants have been falsely implicated by complainant Muhammad Manthar in Direct Complaint No.02/2019 against whom an F.I.R. bearing Crime No.03/2019 has been registered by the accused party; that the applicants intend to surrender before the concerned Court for the purpose of seeking remedy of pre-arrest bail but since non bailable warrants have been issued, they apprehend their arrest at the time of surrender and therefore, need some protection. Without touching merits of the case, the applicants are admitted to protective bail for a period of 08 days from today subject to their furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.20,000/- each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 08 days on 26.03.2019 or on surrender of the applicants before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Till then Non Bailable Warrants issued against the applicants shall remain suspended. The bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
